dalmeni dalmeni
dagulu kaattudhu.
andha dullaana figure-ukkum thaan
pasanga mattudhu.

kannaadi munnadi 
azhaga yeththudhu.
ammala pinnadi alayavida
adikkal naattudhu.

koovamum aarudhaan
kulichida mudiyumaa.
kadhalum bodhathaan
sarakku pol aagumaa.

Bodhayil naan paduththaa
bodhimara nyanamellam
tubelight-u tubelight-aa
eriyum theriyumaa....
Yen da!!, yen da!!

andha dullaana figure-ukkum thaan

ammala pinnadi alayavida

Pothi's-la podava vaangi
poththi kadhal valarththaalum
samsung nokia-nu phone-u
vaangi koduththaalum
INOX Sathiyamnu onnaave
thirinjaalum
I LUV U solli neeyum
kattipidichi urundaalum

ponnukellaam kadhal ingae
time paas-u thaanda

un life-u pass thaandaa.

Yen da!!, yen da!!
Yen da!!, yen da!!

Ye kadhala paththi
thappaa sonnaa pichiduven pichi
oru dhevadhaya paathirundhaa
unakku puriyum machi.

Love-u onnum pannidaadha
empty-aana idhayam
oru kuppa serum thottiyinu
kozhandhaikkumthaan theriyum

Yen da!!, yen da!!
Yen da!!, yen da!!
Yen da!!,

Pada pada pattaampoochi
manasukulla parakkanumaa.
paadham rendum boomiyile
padaamale nadakkanumaa.

Anushkaa pola unakku
ponnu onnu venum
nee hanumaar-aa irundhuputta
love-u enga thonum.

sarakku podha theerndhu pogum
kadhal pola varuma
andha kadhal-aala sadhikkalaam
love-u pannikka maamaa.

Yen da!!, yen da!!

Coffee day-il thodaraum kadhal
tasmac-ula mudiyudhu.
kaasirundha mattum thaanda
kadhal kanna thorakkudhu
anushkaave vandhaalum
enaku onnum venaam

naan half adichu paduthaa
ava aruvaa thaanaa.
kanavula, ava varuvaa thaanaa

Yen da!!, ada yen da!!

neelavaanam neelavaam
neela vaanam - pola
kadha oru saamithandha
jeevadhaaram.

vaaraa vaaraam ezhu naalum
odippogum
indha bomyile kadhal mattum
nilayaai nikkum

love-a pola tasmac-u
eppavumey mass-u
but you das solren
kettukonga boss-u

rendayum kattruthandha
namma dhevadaasu
avanukku munnaale
neenga dummy piece

Yen da!!, yen da!!
ada yenda

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yen Da'?

'Yen Da' conveys a lively and energetic vibe, celebrating youth and fun moments in life.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Ula'?

The song captures the essence of joy and camaraderie among friends, fitting perfectly into the movie's theme of youthful adventures.

Who are the singers of 'Yen Da'?

The song features a unique collaboration of Dwayne Bravo, Gaana Bala, and Naveen Madhav.

Who is the music director for 'Yen Da'?

The music for 'Yen Da' is composed by Sajan Madhav.

When was 'Yen Da' released?

'Yen Da' was released on October 10, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Yen Da' from the movie *Ula* is a vibrant and energetic track that encapsulates the joy of youth and friendship. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, it evokes feelings of happiness and celebration, making it a perfect fit for parties and gatherings. The collaboration of Dwayne Bravo, Gaana Bala, and Naveen Madhav adds a unique flavor to the song, enhancing its appeal. Overall, it conveys a sense of fun and camaraderie, inviting listeners to join in the celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yen Da from the movie Ula is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, featuring an electrifying collaboration between Dwayne Bravo, Gaana Bala, and Naveen Madhav. The song's infectious beats and lively lyrics make it a perfect anthem for any party or celebration. Dive into the rhythm and let the music elevate your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: The girl is showing off her beauty. Even that attractive figure is just for the boys. In front of the mirror, she looks beautiful. Behind her, the crowd is getting wild. Can shouting help cool things down? Is love just like a drink?
If I express my thoughts, will the wisdom of the mind light up like a bulb?

The girl is showing off her beauty. Even that attractive figure is just for the boys. In front of the mirror, she looks beautiful. Behind her, the crowd is getting wild. What’s up!!, what’s up!! What’s up!!, what’s up!!
Even if you buy a phone from a store and raise love, even if you get a Samsung or Nokia, even if you realize it’s a lie, you still hold on and roll it up saying I LOVE YOU.
For all the girls, love is just a temporary thing, without realizing it, your life will pass by.
What’s up!!, what’s up!! What’s up!!, what’s up!!
If I say something wrong about love, I’ll go crazy. If you had a divine dish, you would understand, buddy.
Love doesn’t do anything; an empty heart knows only how to touch a child’s heart.
What’s up!!, what’s up!! What’s up!!, what’s up!! What’s up!!
Like a butterfly, will it fly in the heart? Will both feet walk on the ground without touching?
Like Anushka, if you want a girl, you should be like Hanuman; where will love come from?
Love will come like a drink that ends; can we achieve love through that?

What’s up!!, what’s up!! Love can start at Coffee Day, but it can also end at a bar. Only if you have money can love show its face. Even if Anushka comes, I don’t want anything; I just want to tease her. In my dreams, will she come? What’s up!!, what’s up!!
The blue sky is like a story, a life that is a journey.
Come, come, every day passes, but love stays in this world.
Love is always a mass like a bar, but I’m telling you, listen up, boss.
Both of us learned from our God; before him, you were just a dummy piece.
What’s up!!, what’s up!! What’s up!!, what’s up!!
